name: Shangguan

skills.name: Piercing Brush
skills.description: Enhances every 3rd Basic Attack, causing it to deal pierce damage. Deals damage when brush strokes of different skills come in contact. Touching Brush Power grants enhanced Basic Attack and Health restoration.

skills.name: Ink Burst
skills.description: Swipes the brush in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in the path. Extra damage is dealt at max distance.

skills.name: Seething Script
skills.description: Summons a brush to write at the target location, dealing damage andslowing enemies in the path.

skills.name: Finishing Stroke
skills.description: Dashes forward, damaging enemies in the path. Can dash again upon coming into contact with an enemy or brushstroke. Dash 3-5 times to become untargetable and damage nearby enemies multiple times.

tips: Shangguan (Assassin): Tier B on international ranked — 47.7% WR.
Build core: Spell Tome, Boots of the Arcane, Venomous Staff.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 47.7%, pick 0.62%, ban 0.05%, popularity tier B.
Counters Diaochan, Mulan, Sima Yi · Weak into Augran, Biron, Musashi.

faqs.question: Is Shangguan good in current season?
faqs.answer: Shangguan is Tier B Assassin with 47.7% win rate, 0.62% pick rate, and 0.05% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Shangguan build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Spell Tome, Boots of the Arcane, Venomous Staff, Savant's Wrath, Sage's Tome, Boots of Resistance. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Shangguan?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Shangguan: Augran, Biron, Musashi. Shangguan is strong into Diaochan, Mulan, Sima Yi.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Mulan, Sima Yi. Countered by: Augran, Biron, Musashi.
